role: This file is the mobile-landscape layout shell that composes the wheel, control rail, detail panel, legend, notice, scrubber, and tether into a single viewport-specific surface.
capabilities: Composed left wheel/state region and right control rail
Top notice rendering with dismiss callback
Rail toolbar with lens, space, layer, resolution, and quantization chips
Live, view, and settings toggles in the rail header
Detail disclosure or empty select hint in the rail body
Legend, timeline scrubber, and selection tether wiring
substance_why: It fully wires the landscape surface, passing state and callbacks to every control, detail panel, and overlay rather than leaving stubs.
interactions_present: Wheel or state display via WheelOrState
Detail dismiss/focus/set-pole via s.setSelected, s.focusCentre, s.setPole
interactions_missing: DecisionsBar receives no props or callbacks from the layout
No keyboard or gesture handling in the layout itself
No loading, error, or skeleton state for the detail panel
No gallery UI is rendered even though galleryOpen gates the detail panel
No accessibility attributes or focus management
No animation/transition wiring between wheel and rail states
performance_risks: Inline arrow functions recreated every render for onDismiss, onReset, onFocus, and onSetPole can break child memoization
The entire SurfaceState object is passed wholesale to WheelOrState, Legend, and Notice, causing broad re-render propagation
No React.memo or structural splitting to isolate rail re-renders from wheel updates
reuse_why: The landscape-specific component arrangement and control wiring should be preserved, but the monolithic JSX, inline closures, and hard-coded CSS layout need rebuilding for the new design system.
decomposition_hints: Extract the right rail into its own Rail component
Split rail-head toolbar from rail-detail content
Make Notice, Scrubber, and Tether global overlay components independent of orientation
Separate the detail panel (Disclosure/SelectHint) into a reusable DetailPane
Isolate orientation-specific layout from state wiring via a thin layout container
